studies.title: GAIA - Digital Therapeutics | News
studies.abstract: In addition, BfArM confirmed that attexis® provides comprehensive care benefits in several patient-relevant dimensions, including improvements in quality of life and the ability to manage everyday challenges caused by ADHD. These findings underline the holistic potential of attexis® as part of a multimodal, evidence-based treatment approach.
studies.brief_summary: In addition, BfArM confirmed that attexis® provides comprehensive care benefits in several patient-relevant dimensions, including improvements in quality of life and the ability to manage everyday challenges caused by ADHD. These findings underline the holistic potential of attexis® as part of a multimodal, evidence-based treatment approach.

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions 'attexis®', the digital therapeutic product by GAIA AG, in the context of its approval and benefits for ADHD treatment in adults. The product name appears multiple times in the full text, confirming the study's focus on this specific digital therapeutic.

_classification.reason: The content provided is a news article about digital therapeutics and does not describe a primary study design or results. It lacks details on randomization or observational data collection, indicating it is not a primary RCT or RWE study.

studies.title: GAIA - Digital Therapeutics | News
studies.abstract: attexis® is a personalized, fully-automated digital therapy designed to help adult ADHD patients better manage their symptoms. Its efficacy and safety are currently being studied in a large-scale clinical trial (RCT).
studies.brief_summary: attexis® is a personalized, fully-automated digital therapy designed to help adult ADHD patients better manage their symptoms. Its efficacy and safety are currently being studied in a large-scale clinical trial (RCT).

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions 'attexis®', a digital therapy for adult ADHD patients, developed by GAIA AG. The full text confirms a license agreement for the marketing of attexis® in Germany, and its efficacy and safety are being studied in a clinical trial.

_classification.reason: The content provided is a news article about a digital therapeutic product and mentions ongoing RCTs, but it does not present primary study results or details of a specific study design.
